domain: Gazelle stotting honest signal — vertical leaps with stiff legs; only fit gazelles can perform; deters predator chase; handicap principle of costly signaling.
specific_mechanism: Costly behavior cannot be faked by low-quality individuals → reliable signal of fitness.
llm_application: STOT-SIGNAL: multi-agent communication primitive — each worker agent emits a COSTLY honesty-signal alongside its response (verification trace, tool-execution receipt, proof-of-work). Receiving agents weight worker outputs by signal cost. Workers that cannot produce valid signals are weighted near zero.
novelty_claim: TRiSM is comprehensive trust framework. Collusion detection is post-hoc analysis. Governance signals are configuration metadata. STOT-SIGNAL differs by REQUIRING each response to carry a COSTLY HONESTY-SIGNAL on the message — handicap-principle costly signaling making deception expensive at message-emission time.
